name: MrScraper
description: A scraping platform that provides a RESTful API and SDKs to create and run web scrapes, manage projects, and retrieve results.

auth_methods.note: Official authentication reference states API keys are sent in the Authorization header as a bearer token; no OAuth or other flows supported.

credential_access.note: Developers can sign up and create API keys from the dashboard; free trial credits are available on signup but continued use requires a paid plan per pricing page.

api_surface.note: Mrscraper exposes a RESTful HTTP API covering projects, scrapes, billing, SDKs, and webhooks; many core product objects are represented in the API reference.

buildability.note: API docs and onboarding allow self-serve API key creation and examples; free trial credits exist but long-term use requires paying for a plan (pricing page).

queries: Mrscraper developer docs REST API reference
